gaps.description: Code execution implementation uses quickjs-emscripten sandbox instead of AsyncFunction eval as specified in EXPECTED_DBB.md. Both are browser-compatible, but implementation is more sophisticated than design.
Custom provider without customProvider hook still requires apiKey (line 65 in provider.ts), partially deviating from 'skips apiKey validation' requirement in EXPECTED_DBB.md.
Shell tool (shell_exec) added beyond PRD specification as enhancement.
Python code execution with auto-detection added (pyodide for browser, python3 for Node). Not specified in PRD but fully functional.

All core acceptance criteria met: multi-round loop with MAX_TOOL_ROUNDS=10, AgenticFileSystem for file I/O, images populated in results, systemPrompt passed to provider, apiKey validation for anthropic/openai, package.json publishConfig, README install instructions.
All core modules match design: agent loop (ask.ts), provider abstraction (anthropic/openai/custom), tool system (search/code/file/shell), type definitions, configuration options.
